title: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.52 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.42 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.21 per share a year ago.

title: ADP stock drops toward a 10-month low after human resources outsourcing company lifts profit growth outlook but keeps revenue growth view intact
text: Automatic Data Processing Inc. ADP reported Wednesday fiscal third-quarter earnings that topped expectations, and nudged up its full-year profit outlook while keeping its revenue outlook intact. The human resources outsourcing services company's stock slumped 1.3% toward a 10-month low in premarket trading.

title: ADP Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Results
text: ROSELAND, N.J. , April 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a leading global technology company providing human capital management (HCM) solutions, today announced its third quarter fiscal 2023 financial results along with its revised fiscal 2023 outlook through an earnings release available on the company's website at investors.adp.com/events-and-presentations.
